name: vscode-mapper-agent
description: AI-powered architecture mapping for VS Code using LangChain.

chatParticipants.name: mapper
chatParticipants.description: Your project's architect and scrum master.

commands.name: summary
commands.description: Generate a Daily Standup note from your recent Git commits.

commands.name: draw
commands.description: Visualize the project's architecture with a Mermaid diagram.

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain the role of the currently open file in the architecture.

mapper.useUserKey.description: Whether to use your own Gemini API key for mapping.
